title: triolena pileoides
intro: Triolena pileoides, also known as the Pilea plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, with applications in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is rich in antioxidants, which can help to protect against cell damage and promote overall health and well-being. Triolena pileoides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine.
